reviews.author: Kiryl (Meta) (author)
reviews.summary: From: Kiryl Shutsemau <kas@kernel.org> page_slab() contained an open-coded implementation of compound_head(). Replace the duplicated code with a direct call to compound_head(). --- mm/slab.h | 14 +------------- 1 file changed, 1 insertion(+), 13 deletions(-) diff --git a/mm/slab.h b/mm/slab.h index 1a1b3758df05..7d3b929019ae 100644 --- a/mm/slab.h +++ b/mm/slab.

2026-02-27.patch_summary:
From: Kiryl Shutsemau <kas@kernel.org>

page_slab() contained an open-coded implementation of compound_head().

Replace the duplicated code with a direct call to compound_head().

reviews.author: Vlastimil Babka
reviews.summary: No explicit review or comment from Vlastimil Babka.

2026-02-28.patch_summary: This patch series refactors the slab allocator to use compound_head() in page_slab(), replacing duplicated code and improving maintainability.

reviews.author: Vlastimil Babka
reviews.summary: The patch looks good and the change is straightforward. However, it's worth noting that this patch series might be a good candidate for the 'RFC' status to gather more feedback before merging.

2026-03-02.patch_summary: This patch series replaces duplicated code in the mm/slab module with a direct call to compound_head(). The change aims to simplify and improve maintainability of the page_slab() function.
